notes: Compile-Time Evaluation wave entering Phase 00 stub audit. Target scope (docs/implementation/wave14_compile_time_evaluation.md): compiler/consteval/ package with a pure const-expression evaluator for integer / bool / char values, a const-fn purity checker (no FFI, no non-const calls, no spawn / unsafe / closures / mutable borrows / interior-mutable names), substitution of evaluated const / static / array-length / enum-discriminant expressions into the HIR before monomorphization, and size_of / align_of intrinsics routed through typetable layout queries. Driver wires the phase strictly between check.Check and monomorph.Specialize. Proof program const_fn.fuse will compute factorial(5) via a recursive const fn and return it as the process exit code. P00 commit: updated .claude/current-wave.json to {W14, P00}; the STUBS.md Active-row description for 'Compile-time evaluation (const fn, size_of, align_of)' is already accurate so no Active-table refresh is required. Next: implementation commit landing the consteval package, HIR SymID extensions, driver integration, lower-side CastExpr + suffixed-int-literal fixes, and the const_fn.fuse proof program.
